resultRaw.sql: SELECT s.id AS student_id, s.index_number AS index_number, s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS full_name, s.gpa AS gpa FROM public.students AS s WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.gpa DESC, s.last_name ASC, s.first_name ASC, s.id ASC LIMIT 10;

issues: All encoded fields (full_name, gpa, index_number, student_id) exist in metadata.columns — good.

The Vega-Lite sort uses an aggregation ("op":"max") on gpa; this can be confusing because the SQL ordering includes tie-breakers (last_name, first_name, id). The chart sort only by gpa may not preserve the SQL's deterministic tie ordering.

Using full_name as the x-axis category assumes names are unique. If two students share the same full_name, Vega-Lite may aggregate their gpa values into a single bar (or otherwise not show distinct bars). To guarantee one bar per student, include student_id (or the index_number) as a detail/tooltip label or use a unique label on the x-axis.

result.sql: SELECT s.id AS student_id, s.index_number AS index_number, s.first_name || ' ' || s.last_name AS full_name, s.gpa AS gpa FROM public.students AS s WHERE s.gpa IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.gpa DESC, s.last_name ASC, s.first_name ASC, s.id ASC LIMIT 10;

issues: All encoded fields (full_name, gpa, index_number, student_id) exist in metadata.columns — good.

The Vega-Lite sort uses an aggregation ("op":"max") on gpa; this can be confusing because the SQL ordering includes tie-breakers (last_name, first_name, id). The chart sort only by gpa may not preserve the SQL's deterministic tie ordering.

Using full_name as the x-axis category assumes names are unique. If two students share the same full_name, Vega-Lite may aggregate their gpa values into a single bar (or otherwise not show distinct bars). To guarantee one bar per student, include student_id (or the index_number) as a detail/tooltip label or use a unique label on the x-axis.
